_All claims below are sourced from `../raw/web/openai-pricing-2026.md` unless otherwise noted._

## What it does

OpenAI's public pricing as of 2026-05-01.

## Key features

- GPT-4 pricing **$10 / million input, $30 / million output** (down materially from 2024 rates of $30 / $60).

## When to use

Cost modeling — note the linked canonical file `../../api-pricing-reference.md` is from 2024-09 and uses the older rates; review.
